name: Peak Design Tech Pouch
description: This 2L Tech Pouch from Peak Design is an easy-access organizer for all your tech essentials.

features.Key Features:: 200D Water-Resistant Nylon Exterior | Versatile & Space Efficient | Electronic Accessories Compartment | Compatible with Select Peak Travel Bags | Mounts Align with Travel Bag Openings | Water-Resistant Zippered Closure | 15 Organizational Interior Pockets | Interior and Exterior Zippered Pockets | Power Cord Pass-Through
